CVE-2020-29583 – Zyxel Multiple Products
alerts.summary: Zyxel firewalls (ATP, USG, VM) and AP Controllers (NXC2500 and NXC5500) contain a use of hard-coded credentials vulnerability in an undocumented account ("zyfwp") with an unchangeable password.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-8394 – Zoho ManageEngine
alerts.summary: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus (SDP) contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows remote users to upload files via login page customization.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-10189 – Zoho ManageEngine
alerts.summary: Zoho ManageEngine Desktop Central contains a file upload vulnerability that allows for unauthenticated remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-40539 – Zoho ManageEngine
alerts.summary: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus contains an authentication bypass vulnerability affecting the REST API URLs which allow for remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-27561 – Yealink Device Management
alerts.summary: Yealink Device Management contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that allows for unauthenticated remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-9978 – WordPress Social Warfare Plugin
alerts.summary: WordPress Social Warfare plugin contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows for remote code execution. This vulnerability affects Social Warfare and Social Warfare Pro.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-11738 – WordPress Snap Creek Duplicator Plugin
alerts.summary: WordPress Snap Creek Duplicator plugin contains a file download vulnerability when an administrator creates a new copy of their site that allows an attacker to download the generated files from their Wordpress dashboard. This vulnerability affects Duplicator and Dulplicator Pro.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-25213 – WordPress File Manager Plugin
alerts.summary: WordPress File Manager plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users to execute PHP code and upload malicious files on a target site.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-4006 – VMware Multiple Products
alerts.summary: VMware Workspace One Access, Access Connector, Identity Manager, and Identity Manager Connector contain a command injection vulnerability. An attacker with network access to the administrative configurator on port 8443 and a valid password for the configurator administrator account can execute commands with unrestricted privileges on the underlying operating system.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-21985 – VMware vCenter Server
alerts.summary: VMware vSphere Client contains an improper input validation vulnerability in the Virtual SAN Health Check plug-in, which is enabled by default in vCenter Server, which allows for remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-21972 – VMware vCenter Server
alerts.summary: VMware vCenter Server vSphere Client contains a remote code execution vulnerability in a vCenter Server plugin which allows an attacker with network access to port 443 to execute commands with unrestricted privileges on the underlying operating system.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-3952 – VMware vCenter Server
alerts.summary: VMware vCenter Server contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the VMware Directory Service (vmdir) when the Platform Services Controller (PSC) does not correctly implement access controls. Successful exploitation allows an attacker with network access to port 389 to extract sensitive information.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-22005 – VMware vCenter Server
alerts.summary: VMware vCenter Server contains a file upload vulnerability in the Analytics service that allows a user with network access to port 443 to execute code.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-3950 – VMware Multiple Products
alerts.summary: VMware Fusion, Remote Console (VMRC) for Mac, and Horizon Client for Mac contain a privilege escalation vulnerability due to improper use of setuid binaries that allows attackers to escalate privileges to root.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-3992 – VMware ESXi
alerts.summary: VMware ESXi OpenSLP contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an attacker residing in the management network with access to port 427 to perform remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-5544 – VMware VMware ESXi and Horizon DaaS
alerts.summary: VMware ESXi and Horizon Desktop as a Service (DaaS) OpenSLP contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows an attacker with network access to port 427 to overwrite the heap of the OpenSLP service to perform remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-17496 – vBulletin vBulletin
alerts.summary: The PHP module within vBulletin contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution via crafted subWidgets data in an ajax/render/widget_tabbedcontainer_tab_panel request. This CVE ID resolves an incomplete patch for CVE-2019-16759.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-16759 – vBulletin vBulletin
alerts.summary: The PHP module within vBulletin contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution via the widgetConfig[code] parameter in an ajax/render/widget_php routestring request.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-5847 – Unraid Unraid
alerts.summary: Unraid contains a vulnerability due to the insecure use of the extract PHP function that can be abused to execute remote code as root. This CVE is chainable with CVE-2020-5849 for initial access.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-5849 – Unraid Unraid
alerts.summary: Unraid contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to gain access to the administrative interface. This CVE is chainable with CVE-2020-5847 for remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-20085 – TVT NVMS-1000
alerts.summary: TVT devices utilizing NVMS-1000 software contain a directory traversal vulnerability via GET /.. requests.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-36741 – Trend Micro Apex One, Apex One as a Service, and Worry-Free Business Security
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One, Apex One as a Service, and Worry-Free Business Security contain an improper input validation vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to upload files.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-36742 – Trend Micro Apex One, Apex One as a Service, and Worry-Free Business Security
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One, Apex One as a Service, and Worry-Free Business Security contain an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-8599 – Trend Micro Apex One and OfficeScan
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One and OfficeScan server contain a vulnerable EXE file that could allow a remote attacker to write data to a path on affected installations and bypass root login.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-24557 – Trend Micro Apex One, OfficeScan, and Worry-Free Business Security
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One, OfficeScan, and Worry-Free Business Security on Microsoft Windows contain an improper access control vulnerability that may allow an attacker to manipulate a particular product folder to disable the security temporarily, abuse a specific Windows function, and attain privilege escalation.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-8468 – Trend Micro Apex One, OfficeScan and Worry-Free Business Security Agents
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One, OfficeScan, and Worry-Free Business Security agents contain a content validation escape vulnerability that could allow an attacker to manipulate certain agent client components.

alerts.title: CVE-2020-8467 – Trend Micro Apex One and OfficeScan
alerts.summary: Trend Micro Apex One and OfficeScan contain an unspecified vulnerability within a migration tool component that allows for remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-18187 – Trend Micro OfficeScan
alerts.summary: Trend Micro OfficeScan contains a directory traversal vulnerability by extracting files from a zip file to a specific folder on the OfficeScan server, leading to remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-9082 – ThinkPHP ThinkPHP
alerts.summary: ThinkPHP contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution via public//?s=index/\think\app/invokefunction&function=call_user_func_array&vars[0]=system&vars[1][]= followed by the command.

alerts.title: CVE-2018-20062 – ThinkPHP noneCms
alerts.summary: ThinkPHP "noneCms" contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution through crafted use of the filter parameter.

primary.title: OPORD summary
primary.body: 6 AO sites assessed. 5/6 DZ GO. HF GOOD. SATCOM NOMINAL. GPS NOMINAL. 2 aircraft in AO airspace.
